## Quality gates

- [ ] No competing hard-coded business facts were introduced
- [ ] Provisional facts/assets remain labeled and excluded from production
- [ ] UI changes use documented tokens/components and include relevant screenshots
- [ ] Accessibility and reduced-motion behavior remain intact
- [ ] Performance and third-party cost were considered
- [ ] Setup, editor, deployment, or handoff docs were updated when behavior changed
